description: In this session, Amal Shah and Sahil from Quicknode discuss how to leverage node services to enhance your Solana project, especially during the Ignition Hackathon. They explain the importance of using dedicated node services to avoid rate limits and ensure scalability, particularly for NFT projects experiencing high demand spikes. They also highlight the elastic pricing model of Quicknode, which allows for cost flexibility based on usage. Participants are encouraged to utilize Quicknode's free access to Solana's Mainnet, testnet, or Devnet during the hackathon.
topic_summary: Amal Shah and Sahil from Quicknode present on utilizing node services to scale Solana projects effectively, emphasizing the benefits of avoiding rate limits and ensuring scalability during high-demand periods, particularly for hackathon participants.
